"The plot is not strong, the script is not the best, but I enjoyed it."

additional_patterns.name: nostalgia_preference
evidence: "Let me explain this review in this way. I saw this with my wife when it first came out and we enjoyed it so it has nostalgia on its side for me."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and romantic dramas, often appreciating good acting and engaging stories. They prefer fast-paced narratives and have a nostalgic inclination towards older films, while showing moderate sensitivity to production quality.
